case_title: WILLIAM LAW VS. RONALD ACUNA et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAW, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT ACUNA, RONALD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACUNA, RONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 359 HYDE STREET, #402, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 (COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO), ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
